description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a combination of gable and flat roof sections, featuring a clean, white facade and large rectangular windows. The structure is composed of several interconnected volumes, including a main living area, a garage, and auxiliary wings. The front yard is landscaped with a pathway leading to the entrance, while the backyard is bordered by trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. A driveway extends along one side, leading to a three-car garage, and there is a visible blue car parked outside. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern white bungalow with gable and flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, a three-car garage, and landscaped front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, gable roofs, large windows, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three-car garage, driveway, and a blue car parked outside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with trees and shrubs, and the flat-roofed section with expansive windows.
description_view_3: Top-down rear-side view showing the roof layout, backyard landscaping, and driveway extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
